
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="fr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Wana-Kera Taxi – Carte Digitale</title>
<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=Nunito:wght@400;600;700;800&display=swap');
  * { margin:0; padding:0; box-sizing:border-box; }

  body {
    font-family: 'Nunito', sans-serif;
    background: #0a2828;
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: flex-start;
    padding: 0 0 40px 0;
  }

  .card {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 420px;
    background: #0a2828;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  /* Header avec fond orange sunset */
  .header {
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ff7700 0%, #dd4400 40%, #aa2200 70%, #1a5050 100%);
    padding: 50px 20px 60px;
    text-align: center;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  .sun {
    position: absolute;
    width: 140px; height: 140px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, #ffe033 0%, #ff9900 50%, transparent 75%);
    bottom: 20px; left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    opacity: 0.5;
    filter: blur(6px);
  }

  .palm-left {
    position: absolute;
    left: -10px; bottom: 0;
    font-size: 80px;
    opacity: 0.35;
    transform: scaleX(-1);
  }
  .palm-right {
    position: absolute;
    right: -10px; bottom: 0;
    font-size: 80px;
    opacity: 0.35;
  }

  .logo-wrap {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    width: 130px; height: 130px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: 4px solid #ff8c00;
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px rgba(255,140,0,0.25), 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.4);
    overflow: hidden;
    margin: 0 auto 16px;
  }

  .logo-wrap img {
    width: 100%; height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
  }

  .brand {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
    font-size: 36px;
    letter-spacing: 4px;
    color: white;
    text-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
    line-height: 1;
  }

  .tagline {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #ffda80;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    margin-top: 6px;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }

  /* Corps */
  .body {
    background: #0d3535;
    padding: 0 20px 20px;
  }

  /* Boutons d'action */
  .actions {
    display: flex;
    gap: 12px;
    padding: 20px 0;
    justify-content: center;
  }

  .action-btn {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 6px;
    text-decoration: none;
    color: white;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  }

  .action-circle {
    width: 58px; height: 58px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: #ff8c00;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 22px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(255,140,0,0.4);
    transition: transform 0.2s;
  }

  .action-circle:active { transform: scale(0.95); }

  .action-circle.green { background: #25D366; }
  .action-circle.purple { background: #C13584; }
  .action-circle.blue { background: #1a6080; }

  /* Séparateur */
  .sep {
    height: 1px;
    background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, #ff8c00, transparent);
    margin: 4px 0 16px;
  }

  /* Services */
  .section-title {
    font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif;
    font-size: 20px;
    letter-spacing: 3px;
    color: #ff8c00;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
  }

  .service-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
    padding: 10px 14px;
    background: rgba(255,140,0,0.08);
    border-radius: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    border-left: 3px solid #ff8c00;
  }

  .svc-icon {
    width: 34px; height: 34px;
    background: #ff8c00;
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 15px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  .svc-text {
    color: white;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
  }

  /* Contact */
  .contact-section {
    margin-top: 16px;
  }

  .contact-item {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 12px;
    padding: 12px 14px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
    border-radius: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    text-decoration: none;
    color: white;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    transition: background 0.2s;
  }

  .contact-item:active { background: rgba(255,140,0,0.15); }

  .contact-icon {
    width: 34px; height: 34px;
    background: #ff8c00;
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 16px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }

  /* Bouton enregistrer contact */
  .save-btn {
    display: block;
    width: 100%;
    margin-top: 20px;
    padding: 16px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff8c00, #cc4400);
    color: white;
    text-align: center;
    border-radius: 14px;
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: 800;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    text-decoration: none;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(255,100,0,0.4);
  }

  /* Footer */
  .footer {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 20px;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="card">

  <!-- HEADER -->
  <div class="header">
    <div class="sun"></div>
    <div class="palm-left">🌴</div>
    <div class="palm-right">🌴</div>
    <div class="logo-wrap">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Logo Wana-Kera Taxi"/>
    </div>
    <div class="brand">WANA-KERA TAXI</div>
    <div class="tagline">Votre trajet, notre priorité</div>
  </div>

  <!-- CORPS -->
  <div class="body">

    <!-- Boutons rapides -->
    <div class="actions">
      <a href="tel:0696039329" class="action-btn">
        <div class="action-circle">📞</div>
        Appeler
      </a>
      <a href="https://wa.me/596696039329" class="action-btn">
        <div class="action-circle green">💬</div>
        WhatsApp
      </a>
      <a href="https://instagram.com/wanakerataxi" class="action-btn">
        <div class="action-circle purple">📸</div>
        Instagram
      </a>
      <a href="https://cantobiongeraldine041-afk.github.io/wanakerataxi/" class="action-btn">
        <div class="action-circle blue">📱</div>
        Appli
      </a>
    </div>

    <div class="sep"></div>

    <!-- Services -->
    <div class="section-title">NOS SERVICES</div>

    <div class="service-item">
      <div class="svc-icon">➕</div>
      <div class="svc-text">Transport sanitaire</div>
    </div>
    <div class="service-item">
      <div class="svc-icon">⛵</div>
      <div class="svc-text">Transport portuaire</div>
    </div>
    <div class="service-item">
      <div class="svc-icon">✈️</div>
      <div class="svc-text">Transport aéroportuaire</div>
    </div>
    <div class="service-item">
      <div class="svc-icon">📍</div>
      <div class="svc-text">Excursions sur mesure</div>
    </div>
    <div class="service-item">
      <div class="svc-icon">📋</div>
      <div class="svc-text">Courses et démarches administratives</div>
    </div>

    <!-- Contact -->
    <div class="contact-section">
      <a href="tel:0696039329" class="contact-item">
        <div class="contact-icon">📞</div>
        0696 03 93 29
      </a>
      <a href="https://instagram.com/wanakerataxi" class="contact-item">
        <div class="contact-icon">📸</div>
        wanakerataxi
      </a>
      <a href="https://cantobiongeraldine041-afk.github.io/wanakerataxi/" class="contact-item">
        <div class="contact-icon">🌐</div>
        wanakerataxi.app
      </a>
    </div>

    <!-- Bouton enregistrer -->
    <a href="tel:0696039329" class="save-btn">
      💾 Enregistrer le contact
    </a>

  </div>

  <div class="footer">WANA-KERA TAXI • Martinique</div>
</div>
</body>
</html>
